title: Drip vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Drip and Flodesk email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and ratings to find the best fit for your business.
intro: Drip and Flodesk are both capable email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Drip focuses on e-commerce integration and revenue tracking, while Flodesk emphasizes beautiful design and visual branding. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right tool for your specific business needs.
choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store and need deep shopping cart integration and revenue attribution
You require SMS capabilities alongside email marketing
You want sophisticated segmentation and automation for product-based businesses
choose_b_if: Design and visual aesthetics are central to your brand identity
You want unlimited subscribers at a flat monthly rate
You prefer a simpler, more intuitive interface for email creation

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Drip excels for e-commerce businesses requiring advanced revenue tracking and SMS, while Flodesk is superior for visual brands prioritizing design quality and simplicity. Flodesk has higher customer ratings overall, but Drip offers more specialized commerce features.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Drip or Flodesk?
faq.a: Both start at nearly the same price ($39 vs $38), but Flodesk's flat-rate pricing includes unlimited subscribers, while Drip's pricing scales with subscriber count. For larger lists, Flodesk becomes significantly more cost-effective.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Drip?
faq.a: Yes, most email platforms support standard CSV exports of your subscriber list. However, you'll need to manually recreate workflows and campaigns in Drip. Consider using migration services or tools to streamline the process.
